name: Zendesk
one_liner: Cloud-based customer service and support ticketing platform.
self_serve_notes: Developers can sign up for a free 14-day trial account and immediately generate API tokens or OAuth credentials from Admin Center.

api_surface.notes: Extensive REST API covering tickets, users, orgs, macros, automations, custom objects, and search.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Zendesk toolkit with 452 tools and 2 triggers using OAuth2.

name: Intercom
one_liner: Customer messaging platform combining live chat, help desk, and tickets.
self_serve_notes: Developer Hub issues an Access Token immediately upon creating an app for your own workspace, no approval needed.

api_surface.notes: Broad REST API for contacts, conversations, tickets, articles, data events, and analytics.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists an Intercom toolkit with 133 tools using OAuth2.

name: Freshdesk
one_liner: Cloud help desk software for ticketing, automation, and knowledge base.
self_serve_notes: API key is visible in Profile Settings immediately, including on free trial accounts (with lower rate limits).

api_surface.notes: REST API covers tickets, contacts, companies, solutions/knowledge base, automations, SLAs, and time tracking.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Freshdesk toolkit with 178 tools using Basic Auth credentials.

name: Front
one_liner: Shared inbox and customer communication hub for support teams.
self_serve_notes: API tokens can be generated freely in account settings for a single-instance integration; OAuth/public app distribution needs Front's app framework and possible exception approval.

api_surface.notes: REST API for conversations, messages, contacts, tags, channels, and rules.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio has a Front toolkit/auth-config but notes actions are 'coming soon', so tool coverage is currently narrow/incomplete.

main_blocker: Composio toolkit tools still limited (coming soon)

name: Pylon
one_liner: Modern B2B customer support and ticketing platform for SaaS companies.
self_serve_notes: No free trial; plans require an annual contract with seat minimums, but an admin can generate API tokens once subscribed.

api_surface.notes: REST API for issues, accounts, and contacts; documented but smaller surface than legacy helpdesks.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Pylon runs its own official remote MCP server (mcp.usepylon.com) with OAuth; no Composio toolkit found (404 on guessed slug).

main_blocker: No free trial; requires paid annual contract

name: LiveAgent
one_liner: Multichannel help desk software with live chat, ticketing, and call center.
self_serve_notes: Admins generate an API key in Configuration > System > API on any account, including trials.

api_surface.notes: REST API v3 documented per-instance covering tickets, contacts, agents, and devices.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists LiveAgent with API_KEY auth but currently zero tools/triggers implemented.

main_blocker: Composio toolkit has no tools yet; would need direct API integration

name: Plain
one_liner: API-first customer support platform built around GraphQL for B2B SaaS.
self_serve_notes: Create a machine user and generate a scoped API key directly from workspace Settings, no approval needed.

api_surface.notes: Full GraphQL API and schema for threads, customers, companies, and tiers, designed API-first.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Plain toolkit with 22 tools using API key auth, including raw GraphQL query support.

name: Help Scout
one_liner: Email-based shared inbox and help desk for small-to-mid customer support teams.
self_serve_notes: Any user can create a My App from their profile and use the Client Credentials flow to get a bearer token without external approval.

api_surface.notes: Mailbox API covers conversations, customers, mailboxes, tags, and workflows over HTTPS-only OAuth2.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Guessed Composio slugs (help-scout, helpscout) both 404'd; a search snippet claimed a listing but could not be verified on an actual page.

name: Gorgias
one_liner: Helpdesk built for ecommerce brands, integrating deeply with Shopify and social channels.
self_serve_notes: Private-app API key with HTTP Basic Auth is available directly from account settings; public apps distributed to other users require OAuth2 and Gorgias approval.

api_surface.notes: REST API for tickets, customers, teams, tags, and account settings.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Composio lists a Gorgias toolkit with 32 tools, supporting both API Key and OAuth2.

name: Gladly
one_liner: Enterprise customer-centric contact center platform unifying voice, chat, and email.
self_serve_notes: No public free trial or self-serve signup; access is sales-led with custom annual contracts, though existing customer admins can self-serve API tokens once onboarded.

api_surface.notes: REST API documented for conversations, customers, and webhooks, with a sandbox environment for existing customers.

existing_mcp_or_composio_toolkit.notes: Guessed Composio slug (gladly) 404'd and no confirmation found elsewhere; no official MCP server found in docs.

main_blocker: Contact-sales onboarding, no public trial access
